maxAttempts.description: Bounded delivery attempts before a message is dead-lettered (exponential backoff is emulated deterministically in the harness).

dedup.description: When true, an inbound duplicate `messageId` is deduped once (Idempotent Receiver).

dlq.description: When true, an attempts-exhausted message lands in the Dead Letter Channel rather than being dropped or retried forever.

description:
The **reliability** block of a Port (doc 05 §reliability). Retries are bounded then the message is
dead-lettered; `dedup` turns on the Idempotent Receiver at the inbound edge.
